holidays.name: New Year's Day
holidays.local_name: နှစ်သစ်ကူးနေ့
holidays.description: The first day of the Gregorian calendar.

holidays.name: Independence Day
holidays.local_name: လွတ်လပ်ရေးနေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates Myanmar's declaration of independence from British rule in 1948.

holidays.name: Union Day
holidays.local_name: ပြည်ထောင်စုနေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates the signing of the Panglong Agreement in 1947.

holidays.name: Peasants' Day
holidays.local_name: တောင်သူလယ်သမားနေ့
holidays.description: A day to honor the contribution of farmers to the national economy.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Tabaung
holidays.local_name: တပေါင်းလပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: The last full moon day of the Burmese lunar calendar year.

holidays.name: Armed Forces Day
holidays.local_name: တပ်မတော်နေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates the start of resistance against Japanese occupation in 1945.

holidays.name: Thingyan Eve
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အကြိုနေ့
holidays.description: The start of the Myanmar Water Festival.

holidays.name: Thingyan Akya Day
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အကျနေ့
holidays.description: The day when Thagyamin is said to descend to earth.

holidays.name: Thingyan Akat Day
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အကြတ်နေ့
holidays.description: The middle day of the Water Festival.

holidays.name: Thingyan Atat Day
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အတက်နေ့
holidays.description: The final day of the water throwing festival.

holidays.name: Myanmar New Year Day
holidays.local_name: မြန်မာနှစ်ဆန်းတစ်ရက်နေ့
holidays.description: The first day of the Myanmar lunar calendar.

holidays.name: Labour Day
holidays.local_name: အလုပ်သမားနေ့

holidays.name: Full Moon of Kason
holidays.local_name: ကဆုန်လပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Buddha Day, celebrating the birth, enlightenment, and passing of Buddha.

holidays.name: Martyrs' Day
holidays.local_name: အာဇာနည်နေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates the assassination of Gen. Aung San and his cabinet in 1947.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Waso
holidays.local_name: ဝါဆိုလပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: The start of the three-month Buddhist Lent (Vassa).

holidays.name: Full Moon of Thadingyut
holidays.local_name: သီတင်းကျွတ်လပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Festival of Lights marking the end of Buddhist Lent.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Tazaungmon
holidays.local_name: တန်ဆောင်မုန်းလပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Festival of lights and robe-weaving (Matho Thingan) competitions.

holidays.name: National Day
holidays.description: Commemorates the 1920 university student strike against British colonial rule.

holidays.name: Christmas Day
holidays.local_name: ခရစ္စမတ်နေ့
holidays.description: Celebration of the birth of Jesus Christ.

metadata.disclaimer: Local-first mock data for code test purposes.
